questions.question: What nation's 34-mile rail tunnel is the longest in the world?
What U.S. classical conductor won posthumous Grammy Awards in 1991, 1992 and 1993?
What couple did the archbishop of Canterbury wed, gushing: "Here's the stuff of which fairy tales are made"?
How many of every four Polish rivers were deemed biologically dead by 1990?
What golfer nixed Clinton's invite to a 50th anniversary tribute to Jackie Robinson in favor of catching rays in Cancun?
What future First Lady did Wellesley College classmates dub "Sister Frigidaire"?
